Features We Offer

Experience the next generation of website building with our cutting-edge features.

AI Assistance

Our AI assists in generating content, write-ups, and descriptions tailored to your needs.

Custom Images

Integrate your logos or let our AI design images based on your descriptions.

Easy Hosting

Choose between our in-house hosting or integrate with your preferred platform.

SEO Implementation

Optimize your website's visibility with our in-built SEO protocols.

Full Source Code Access

Once your website is ready, download the full source code for customization.

Custom Styling

Future updates will allow you to modify your website's theme with a click.

Product roadmap

A product roadmap shows the path ahead, helps teams plan, and guides the delivery of the product.

P1
  • Development team initializing bot product
  • Templates designer by GFX Team
  • Utility product identified
  • Initialisation of custom bot developmen
P2
  • Extended Template designs for Multi-Industry use
  • GPT Integration through Imaging & Write-ups
  • WEBAI Custom Hosting and/or 3rd Party mirroring
  • Custom dApp where users can create websites in their browser
P3
  • Testings of SEO optimisation through custom generated Website
  • Announce of Krueger Stealth launch into Socials
  • Bot developed & live prior ERC20 launch
P4
  • KYC Verification through Assure DeFi
  • DEX launch with heavy KOL focussed advertisements
  • Preparing for development phase.
P5
  • Fast track CMC/CG/DexTools
  • First CEX listing through T2 platform as soon as initial listing requirements are set
P6
  • Testing and quality assurance.
  • Further Developments.

Frequently Asked Questions

Got questions about WebsiteAI? We've got answers. Dive into our FAQ section to learn more.

WebsiteAI is a cutting-edge tool that assists in generating website content, designs, and layouts using artificial intelligence. It streamlines the website creation process, making it efficient and user-friendly.

You can access WebsiteAI through our web platform. Simply sign up for an account, and you can start creating your website instantly!

WebsiteAI offers a basic version that's free to use. We also have premium plans with additional features and capabilities for more advanced needs.

WebsiteAI uses advanced algorithms and machine learning models to analyze user inputs and generate content that matches the desired theme and context of the website.

Absolutely! While WebsiteAI provides initial content suggestions, you have full control to edit, modify, or replace any generated content to fit your needs.

Yes, data security is our top priority. We implement stringent security measures to ensure that your data is protected and never shared with third parties without your consent.
